descriptions: A shimmering key needed to unlock the exit.
This key pulses with a faint, otherworldly light.
Engraved with runes, it hums softly when held.
A key that seems to whisper 'freedom' when you pick it up.
Cold to the touch, yet glowing faintly in the dark.
A small lantern that casts a warm glow.
An old lantern with scratched glass.
A brass lantern still smelling faintly of oil.
A travel lantern built to endure long journeys.
A storm lantern with thick glass protecting the flame.
A copper lantern polished to a dull shine.
The flame inside flickers softly with every movement.
A lantern filled with oil, ready to burn for hours.
The light reveals more than it should in the darkness.
It casts long, uneasy shadows on the walls.
A wooden torch wrapped in cloth.
A simple torch, ready to be lit.
A torch already burning brightly.
A half-burned torch close to burning out.
A torch coated in pitch for a stronger flame.
A guard's torch, stained with soot.
The torch smolders, sending sparks into the air.
The flame crackles loudly in the silence.
It burns hot and uneven, dripping sparks.

A sword with a worn leather hilt.
A rusty sword that has seen many battles.
A balanced blade suited for combat.

A ring that feels slightly warm to the touch.

An old map with faded markings.
A partially torn map with hand-drawn symbols.

A heavy amulet humming with faint energy.
A pendant that vibrates slightly in your hand.

A coiled rope made of rough fibers.
A heavy pickaxe used for mining.
A pickaxe with a worn handle.
A fresh red apple.
An apple that looks surprisingly fresh.
Crisp and sweet, ready to eat.
A loaf of dry bread.
Simple bread, still edible.
Hard on the outside but filling.
An empty glass bottle.

An altar carved from marble.
A large fountain trickling water, covered in moss.
The fountain seems ancient and grand, dominating the courtyard.

An ornate chandelier that dominates the room with its grandeur.

An ancient tapestry with intricate patterns, worn by time.

Lightweight ammunition for a bow.

A cloak that rustles softly when you move.

Boots designed for long journeys.
